voidRollDescPart2: . All queued moves are wiped, and your turn ends immediately!
rulesDicing2: Roll doubles (e.g., 4+4) to get another roll. All rolls are queued for your turn.
rulesDicing3: Rolling a 1 and a 3 forfeits your entire turn immediately.
rulesCombat1: Landing on a square with a single opponent piece captures it, sending it back to base.
rulesCombat2: Squares marked with 'X' are Safe Zones. Pieces here cannot be captured by normal moves.
rulesCombat3: Two pieces of the same color on one square form a shield and cannot be captured by a single piece.
rulesCombat4: A Pair Shield can only be broken by using a double roll to land two of your pieces on it in the same turn.
rulesCombat5: A newly spawning piece CAN capture an opponent on a Safe Zone.
rulesWinning1: You must capture at least one opponent piece to unlock your "Home Stretch" (the final column leading to the center).
rulesWinning2: Pieces in their Home Stretch are immune to capture.
rulesWinning3: The first player to get all 4 pieces to the center goal wins.
rulesWinning4: You can overshoot the goal. Any remaining dice value must be used by another piece if possible.
shareLinkInstruction: Share this link with your friends to let them join your match.
onlineHumansRequired: Online games require at least 2 human players.
maxOneBotInFourPlayer: Maximum 1 bot allowed in a 4-player game.
allHumansMustBeClaimed: All human seats must be claimed before starting.
